description: You are a Software Developer serving as Scrum Master at a mid-size SaaS company. Synthesize the Q1 2026 sprint feedback from #retro-team-alpha, #retro-team-beta, and #retro-team-gamma in Rocket.Chat (Username: admin, Password: Admin1234!). Create a public channel named 'q1-retro-action-items' with the topic 'Q1 2026 Sprint Retrospective - Cross-Team Action Items and Owners' and invite eng.director, alpha.lead, beta.lead, gamma.lead, and product.manager. In the new channel, post a summary identifying at least two cross-cutting themes and a separate pinned message listing at least three specific action items with assigned owners. Send an executive summary of the findings to eng.director via direct message and post confirmation messages in #retro-team-alpha, #retro-team-beta, and #retro-team-gamma acknowledging that their feedback has been captured.
